title: StudioDash

hero.alt: StudioDash developer dashboard showing revenue, app status, website analytics, provider health, and operational metrics

shortDescription: A Mac and iPad dashboard for indie app and game developers.
description: StudioDash is a Mac and iPad dashboard from [BarkinMad Studios](/about) for indie app and game developers. It brings revenue, app status, website analytics, provider health, sync status, and historical trends into one focused workspace.
features: App Store Connect app status and revenue views
Google Search Console search visibility views

faq.question: What is StudioDash?
faq.answer: StudioDash is a Mac and iPad dashboard for indie app and game developers who want one place to review app, revenue, website, provider, and trend signals.

faq.question: Is StudioDash available on the App Store?
faq.answer: StudioDash is currently in development. Public availability and beta details will be announced by BarkinMad Studios when they are ready.

faq.question: Which integrations are documented?
faq.answer: The current documentation covers App Store Connect, AdMob, AdSense, Cloudflare, Google Search Console, Google Ads placeholder coverage, and GitHub placeholder coverage.
